q: Describe a foreign country you would like to stay or work for a short period of time
cue_card: And explain what you think the experience would be like
examiner_note: Nêu lý do chọn quốc gia đó (văn hóa, cơ hội, phong cảnh).

samples.band7: I'd like to stay in Japan for a few months. I'd love to work in a small cafe or a bookstore in Tokyo to experience their daily life. I chose Japan because I love their culture and food. I think the experience would be very interesting and would help me learn Japanese much faster.
samples.band8: I've always been drawn to the idea of living and working in Japan for a short stint. Ideally, I'd like to find a role in a creative agency in Tokyo to immerse myself in their unique work culture. Japan's blend of ancient traditions and cutting-edge technology is what fascinates me most. I anticipate that the experience would be incredibly eye-opening, allowing me to gain a fresh perspective on discipline and aesthetics.
samples.band9: The destination that tops my list for a temporary residence is Japan. I'm keen to engage in a short-term professional project in Kyoto, perhaps in the field of sustainable design. My fascination with Japan stems from its remarkable ability to harmonize modern innovation with deep-rooted cultural heritage. I believe such an experience would be intellectually enriching and would profoundly broaden my horizons, fostering a deeper appreciation for their meticulous attention to detail and social harmony.

v.example: He had a short stint as a waiter.
Travel can be an eye-opening experience.
She is very meticulous in her work.

topic: Describe a foreign country you would like to stay or work for a short period of time
